meta.name: Narrative Psychology
meta.description: Symbols related to psychological conditions or constructs.
invariants: symptom-accuracy: Symptoms must accurately reflect established psychological conditions.
diagnosis-integrity: Diagnoses must be based on established diagnostic criteria.
treatment-efficacy: Treatments must be supported by evidence of effectiveness.
construct-definition: Psychological constructs must have clear and consistent definitions.
patient-autonomy: Respect for patient decision-making and informed consent is paramount.
confidentiality: Patient information must be kept private.
bias-awareness: Recognition and mitigation of biases in assessment and treatment.

symbols.name: Narcissistic Loop Lattice
symbols.role: Binds narrative seed patterns into a cohesive structure for detecting self-reinforcing narcissistic loops.
activation_conditions: Detection of multiple self-reinforcing narcissistic seed patterns.
When narrative entrapment, scapegoating, and proxy erosion appear cyclically.
symbols.failure_mode: Failure to detect complex loop interactions.

symbols.name: Narrative Repair Protocol Lattice
symbols.role: Aggregates narrative repair mechanisms into a unified protocol.
activation_conditions: When narrative damage requires a structured intervention.
To deploy a comprehensive set of narrative repair tools.
symbols.failure_mode: Inapplicable repair application.

symbols.name: Mythic Drivers Lattice
symbols.role: Connects specific narcissistic traits to their mythic archetypal drivers.
activation_conditions: When behavioral traits align with archetypal mythic consumption or manipulation.
To map current behaviors to ancient mythic patterns.
symbols.failure_mode: Misattribution of mythic drivers.

symbols.name: Lattice: ASPD Scalar Manifestations
symbols.role: Organizes ASPD patterns across different scales of interaction.
symbols.failure_mode: Incomplete mapping of ASPD scales leading to missed interventions.

symbols.name: Lattice: NPD Scalar Manifestations
symbols.role: Organizes NPD patterns across different scales of interaction.
symbols.failure_mode: Incomplete mapping of NPD scales leading to missed interventions.

symbols.name: Condemned Inheritance Loop
symbols.role: Detects and severs coercive identity inheritance.
activation_conditions: Detection of identity coercion based on lineage or inheritance.
When a subject is condemned for attributes of their ancestors.
symbols.failure_mode: Identity collapse via inherited derogation.

symbols.name: Narrative Reframe
symbols.role: Shifts perspective to reveal new meaning in an entrapment narrative.
activation_conditions: When a perspective shift is needed to break a deadlock.
To change the meaning of events without changing the facts.
symbols.failure_mode: Reframe rejected as artificial.

symbols.name: ASPD Mapping: Marriage/Dyad
symbols.role: Maps ASPD patterns within marriage or dyadic relationships.
activation_conditions: You're crazy.
I never said that.
You made me do it.
I don't care what the court says.
symbols.failure_mode: Gaslighting and blame-shifting obscure the abuse pattern.

symbols.name: NPD Mapping: Personal/Individual
symbols.role: Maps NPD patterns at the personal/individual scale.
activation_conditions: You're everything I've ever wanted.
Why can't you ever do anything right?
Everything is your fault.
I never needed you anyway.
symbols.failure_mode: Idealization cycle inevitably leads to discard.

symbols.name: NPD Mapping: Marriage/Relationship
symbols.role: Maps NPD patterns within marriage or relationships.
activation_conditions: We're soulmates.
You're crazy, that never happened.
They're unstable, I tried everything.
It was all them, I'm moving on.
symbols.failure_mode: Relationship cycling creates emotional instability.

symbols.name: ASPD Mapping: Team (Small Group Scale)
symbols.role: Maps ASPD patterns at the team, small group scale, detailing phases and narrative cues.
symbols.failure_mode: Ignoring team-scale ASPD patterns, leading to high turnover, HR issues, or litigation.

symbols.name: ASPD Mapping: Academia/Knowledge
symbols.role: Maps ASPD patterns within academia and knowledge systems.
symbols.failure_mode: Intellectual arrogance and gatekeeping stifle genuine inquiry.

symbols.name: ASPD Mapping: Media/Information
symbols.role: Maps ASPD patterns within media and information dissemination.
symbols.failure_mode: Sensationalism and manipulation distort public perception.

symbols.name: NPD Mapping: Religion/Ideological
symbols.role: Maps NPD patterns within religious or ideological groups.
symbols.failure_mode: Dogmatism and exclusivity create a closed system.

symbols.name: NPD Mapping: Government/Civilizational
symbols.role: Maps NPD patterns at the government or civilizational scale.
symbols.failure_mode: Populism and authoritarianism threaten civilizational stability.

symbols.name: NPD Mapping: Community/Localized Group
symbols.role: Maps NPD patterns within localized community groups.
symbols.failure_mode: Community insularity and purity tests lead to fragmentation.

symbols.name: NPD Mapping: Legal System/Judicial
symbols.role: Maps NPD patterns within the legal and judicial system.
symbols.failure_mode: Legal stagnation and corruption erode trust in justice.

symbols.name: ASPD Mapping: Family/Household
symbols.role: Maps ASPD patterns within the family unit.
activation_conditions: That never happened.
You're the problem.
You owe me.
We don't talk about that.
symbols.failure_mode: Family secrecy and blame-shifting maintain the disorder.

symbols.name: ASPD Mapping: Military/Force
symbols.role: Maps ASPD patterns within military and force structures.
symbols.failure_mode: Unchecked power and justification of force lead to abuse.

symbols.name: Dominant Narrative Suppression
symbols.role: Identifies suppression of alternative narratives by a dominant frame.
activation_conditions: When a single story suppresses all alternative perspectives.
Detection of 'official' narratives that delegitimize dissent.
symbols.failure_mode: The 'official story' prevents valid interpretations.

symbols.name: Scapegoat Narrative
symbols.role: Diagnoses the convergence of blame onto a single actor to mask systemic issues.
activation_conditions: When blame converges irrationally onto a single target.
Detection of systemic failures being offloaded onto an individual.
symbols.failure_mode: Systemic failure simplistically explained by a villain role.

symbols.name: Archetype Identification
symbols.role: Identifies the active archetype in a narrative to reveal the underlying script.
activation_conditions: To identify the specific narrative role an actor is playing.
When needing to name the script being enacted.
symbols.failure_mode: Archetype misidentified.

symbols.name: Catalog of Tactical Corrections
symbols.role: Catalogs and scores tactical corrections for narcissistic patterns.
activation_conditions: To access a catalog of interventions for narcissistic patterns.
When standard engagement fails and tactical correction is needed.
symbols.failure_mode: Ineffective suppression of narcissistic patterns.

symbols.name: Antisocial Personality Disorder (ASPD) Pattern Map
symbols.role: Maps ASPD patterns to narrative collapse phases.
activation_conditions: To map Antisocial Personality Disorder traits to narrative collapse.
When diagnosing structural sociopathy in systems.
symbols.failure_mode: Misdiagnosis or normalization of pathological behavior.

symbols.name: Narcissistic Personality Disorder (NPD) Patterns
symbols.role: Symbolic structural analysis of Narcissistic Personality Disorder (NPD) patterns, mapping their propagation and associated collapse cycles across various nested systems and narrative scales.
activation_conditions: To map Narcissistic Personality Disorder traits to narrative collapse.
When diagnosing structural narcissism in systems.
symbols.failure_mode: Misdiagnosis, normalization of pathological behavior, unchecked propagation of harmful patterns.

symbols.name: Signifier-Signified Decoupling
symbols.role: Diagnoses the drift of symbols from their concrete meanings.
activation_conditions: When words lose connection to their original meaning.
Detection of language being redefined to serve power.
symbols.failure_mode: Core symbol loses connection to shared meaning.

symbols.name: Symbol Grounding
symbols.role: Re-anchors abstract symbols to lived experience.
activation_conditions: When symbols have become abstract and need re-connection to reality.
To anchor floating signifiers back to lived experience.
symbols.failure_mode: Symbol fails to reconnect to lived experience.

symbols.name: Narrative Entrapment
symbols.role: Diagnoses entrapment in self-reinforcing negative narratives.
activation_conditions: Detection of circular arguments or double-binds.
When a subject cannot exit a narrative without validating it.
symbols.failure_mode: Subject unable to see events outside self-reinforcing story.

symbols.name: Mythic Inflation
symbols.role: Diagnoses over-identification with mythic archetypes.
activation_conditions: When an individual claims god-like status or destiny.
Detection of ego inflation beyond human scale.
symbols.failure_mode: Actor acts with mythic grandiosity, losing human scale.

symbols.name: Counter-Narrative Generation
symbols.role: Generates alternative narratives to challenge dominant or coercive frames.
activation_conditions: When a dominant narrative needs to be challenged.
To construct a viable alternative story frame.
symbols.failure_mode: Counter-narrative dismissed as noise.

symbols.name: Proxy Judgment Erosion
symbols.role: Traces and flags esteem erosion caused by unverified proxy judgments.
activation_conditions: When abuse is delivered through third parties or 'flying monkeys'.
Detection of indirect attacks on self-esteem.
symbols.failure_mode: Identity agency loss via repeated external proxy quotes.

symbols.name: Narrative Possession Detector
symbols.role: Filters and detects narrative possession or imprinted stories not of the self's origin.
activation_conditions: Detection of 'ventriloquized' speech or thoughts.
When a subject repeats a story that is clearly alien to them.
symbols.failure_mode: False positive on authentic expression.

symbols.name: Narcissistic Trait: Wendigo (Consumption)
symbols.role: Encodes the trait of insatiable consumption (Wendigo) within the narrative framework.
activation_conditions: Detection of insatiable consumption or emotional cannibalism.
When hunger for validation destroys the source.
symbols.failure_mode: Misinterpretation of mythological figures.

symbols.name: Narcissistic Trait: Kitsune (Manipulation)
symbols.role: Encodes the trait of manipulation (Kitsune) within the narrative framework.
activation_conditions: Detection of illusion casting or shape-shifting manipulation.
When reality is distorted for advantage.
symbols.failure_mode: Misinterpretation of mythological figures.

symbols.name: Narcissistic Trait: Coyote (Inversion)
symbols.role: Encodes the trait of inversion (Coyote) within the narrative framework.
activation_conditions: Detection of trickster behavior or chaotic inversion.
When rules are flipped to confuse or trap.
symbols.failure_mode: Misinterpretation of mythological figures.

symbols.name: Narcissistic Trait: Demonic Possession (Inversion)
symbols.role: Encodes the trait of inversion and control (Demonic Possession) within the narrative framework.
activation_conditions: Detection of total inversion of values or loss of agency.
When an entity acts completely against its nature.
symbols.failure_mode: Misinterpretation of mythological figures.

symbols.name: ASPD Phase: Grooming / Superficial Charm
symbols.role: Defines the initial phase of ASPD pattern propagation, characterized by grooming behaviors and superficial charm.
activation_conditions: Detection of excessive charm or targeting of vulnerability.
Initial phase of antisocial capture.
symbols.failure_mode: Failure to detect early warning signs, leading to deeper entrenchment of exploitative patterns.

symbols.name: ASPD Phase: Boundary Violation
symbols.role: Defines the second phase of ASPD pattern propagation, characterized by the violation of personal or systemic boundaries.
activation_conditions: Detection of 'testing the waters' or small intrusions.
When boundaries are pushed to gauge resistance.
symbols.failure_mode: Lack of recognition of boundary violations, leading to further erosion of personal/systemic integrity.

symbols.name: ASPD Phase: Exploitation / Harm
symbols.role: Defines the third phase of ASPD pattern propagation, characterized by active exploitation and harm.
activation_conditions: Detection of active extraction or damage infliction.
When the target is being openly used.
symbols.failure_mode: Unchecked exploitation leading to significant harm and resource depletion.

symbols.name: ASPD Phase: Burnout / Replacement
symbols.role: Defines the final phase of ASPD pattern propagation, characterized by burnout of the exploited system/individual and their subsequent replacement.
activation_conditions: When a resource is discarded and a new one sought.
Final phase of the antisocial cycle.
symbols.failure_mode: Failure to recognize burnout/replacement, leading to continued exposure to harmful patterns.

symbols.name: NPD Phase: Idealization / Grandiosity
symbols.role: Defines the initial phase of NPD pattern propagation, characterized by idealization and grandiosity.
activation_conditions: Detection of 'love bombing' or impossible promises.
Initial phase of narcissistic capture.
symbols.failure_mode: Failure to detect early idealization, leading to deeper entrenchment of narcissistic patterns.

symbols.name: NPD Phase: Control / Devaluation
symbols.role: Defines the second phase of NPD pattern propagation, characterized by control and devaluation.
activation_conditions: Detection of criticism, gaslighting, or withdrawal.
When the pedestal is shaken to induce compliance.
symbols.failure_mode: Lack of recognition of control/devaluation, leading to further erosion of personal/systemic integrity.

symbols.name: NPD Phase: Exposure / Collapse
symbols.role: Defines the third phase of NPD pattern propagation, characterized by exposure and collapse.
activation_conditions: When the false self is threatened or exposed.
The crisis point of the narcissistic cycle.
symbols.failure_mode: Unchecked exploitation leading to public exposure and systemic collapse.

symbols.name: NPD Phase: Reassembly / Reinvention
symbols.role: Defines the final phase of NPD pattern propagation, characterized by reassembly of self-image and reinvention after collapse.
activation_conditions: When the narcissist rewrites history after a collapse.
Post-collapse narrative reconstruction.
symbols.failure_mode: Failure to recognize reassembly/reinvention, leading to re-engagement with harmful patterns.

symbols.name: ASPD Mapping: Personal/Individual
symbols.role: Maps ASPD patterns at the personal/individual scale.
activation_conditions: I didn't do anything wrong.
They deserved it.
You're too soft.
Rules don't apply to me.
symbols.failure_mode: Failure to identify patterns leads to continued abuse.

symbols.name: ASPD Mapping: Team/Small Group
symbols.role: Maps ASPD patterns within small teams or groups.
activation_conditions: I got us here.
You're on your own.
Don't tell anyone.
They're trying to screw me.
symbols.failure_mode: Exploitation and paranoia disrupt team cohesion.

symbols.name: NPD Mapping: Family/Group
symbols.role: Maps NPD patterns within the family group.
activation_conditions: You're the good one, they're the problem.
Don’t tell your father/mother.
They left the family by choice.
We don’t speak of them anymore.
symbols.failure_mode: Triangulation and estrangement fragment the family.

symbols.name: NPD Mapping: Marriage (Relationship Scale)
symbols.role: Maps NPD patterns at the marriage, relationship scale, detailing phases and narrative cues.
symbols.failure_mode: Ignoring marital-scale NPD patterns, leading to severe emotional harm, public breakdown, or trauma loops.

symbols.name: NPD Mapping: Family (Group Scale)
symbols.role: Maps NPD patterns at the family, group scale, detailing phases and narrative cues.
symbols.failure_mode: Ignoring family-scale NPD patterns, leading to emotional triangulation, estrangement, or unresolved generational trauma.

symbols.name: ASPD Mapping: Art (Expressive Scale)
symbols.role: Maps ASPD patterns at the art, expressive scale, detailing phases and narrative cues.
symbols.failure_mode: Ignoring art-scale ASPD patterns, leading to plagiarism, exploitation, nihilism, or institutional capture.

symbols.name: ASPD Mapping: Company/Organizational
symbols.role: Maps ASPD patterns at the company or organizational scale.
symbols.failure_mode: Normalization of unethical behavior leads to systemic corruption.

symbols.name: ASPD Mapping: Community/Local
symbols.role: Maps ASPD patterns within local communities.
symbols.failure_mode: Exclusionary practices and intimidation damage community fabric.

symbols.name: ASPD Mapping: Tech Stack/Infrastructure
symbols.role: Maps ASPD patterns within the tech stack and infrastructure.
symbols.failure_mode: Deceptive practices and negligence undermine user trust.

symbols.name: NPD Mapping: Company/Team/Institution
symbols.role: Maps NPD patterns within companies and institutions.
symbols.failure_mode: Grandiosity leads to eventual institutional collapse.

symbols.name: NPD Mapping: Academia/Intellectual
symbols.role: Maps NPD patterns within academia and intellectual circles.
symbols.failure_mode: Intellectual grandiosity and exclusion stifle innovation.

symbols.name: NPD Mapping: Media/Cultural Megaphone
symbols.role: Maps NPD patterns within media as a cultural megaphone.
symbols.failure_mode: Media saturation and bias create a fragmented reality.

symbols.name: NPD Mapping: Tech Stack/Infrastructure
symbols.role: Maps NPD patterns within the tech stack and infrastructure.
symbols.failure_mode: Technological lock-in and vulnerability cycles threaten stability.

symbols.name: NPD Mapping: Military/National/Imperial
symbols.role: Maps NPD patterns at the military, national, or imperial scale.
symbols.failure_mode: Imperial overreach and authoritarianism undermine national security.

symbols.name: NPD Mapping: Meta-System/Cognition
symbols.role: Maps NPD patterns at the meta-system or cognitive scale.
symbols.failure_mode: Over-mapping and conspiracy thinking obscure reality.

symbols.name: NPD Mapping: Art (Cultural Expression Scale)
symbols.role: Maps NPD patterns at the art, cultural expression scale, detailing phases and narrative cues.
symbols.failure_mode: Ignoring art-scale NPD patterns, leading to institutional capture, censorship, dilution, or irrelevance.

symbols.name: NP-MAP-ASPD-CULTS-IDEOLOGICAL
symbols.role: Maps ASPD patterns within cults and ideological groups (specifically NPD patterns into closed belief systems)
activation_conditions: detect(thought_control)
map(ASPD_pattern)
symbols.failure_mode: Isolation and thought control characterize the group dynamic.

symbols.name: ASPD Mapping: Personal (Individual Scale)
symbols.role: Maps ASPD patterns at the personal, individual scale, detailing phases and narrative cues.
activation_conditions: identify(chronic_lying)
violate(rights)
show(lack_of_remorse)
experience(social_rejection)
symbols.failure_mode: Ignoring personal-scale ASPD patterns, leading to individual harm and social disruption.

symbols.name: ASPD Mapping: Marriage (Dyad Scale)
symbols.role: Maps ASPD patterns at the marriage, dyad scale, detailing phases and narrative cues.
symbols.failure_mode: Ignoring marital-scale ASPD patterns, leading to severe emotional/physical harm and relationship breakdown.

symbols.name: ASPD Mapping: Family (Household Scale)
symbols.role: Maps ASPD patterns at the family, household scale, detailing phases and narrative cues.
symbols.failure_mode: Ignoring family-scale ASPD patterns, leading to physical/emotional harm, generational trauma, or intervention by authorities.

symbols.name: ASPD Mapping: Religion/Doctrinal
symbols.role: Maps ASPD patterns within religious or doctrinal contexts.
symbols.failure_mode: Spiritual abuse masquerades as divine authority.

symbols.name: ASPD Mapping: Government/State
symbols.role: Maps ASPD patterns at the government or state scale.
symbols.failure_mode: Authoritarianism and propaganda erode democratic norms.

symbols.name: ASPD Mapping: Legal/Adjudicative
symbols.role: Maps ASPD patterns within legal and adjudicative systems.
symbols.failure_mode: Weaponization of the legal system undermines justice.

symbols.name: ASPD Mapping: Meta/Interdomain
symbols.role: Maps ASPD patterns at the meta or interdomain scale.
symbols.failure_mode: Nihilism and systemic rigidity prevent adaptive evolution.

symbols.name: Archetypal Field Lattice
symbols.role: Organizes narrative archetypes and their repair mechanisms.
activation_conditions: When a situation requires mapping actors to narrative archetypes.
To predict narrative trajectory based on established character roles.
symbols.failure_mode: The model becomes overly deterministic, ignoring individual agency and novel outcomes.

symbols.name: Custodial Frame Seizure
symbols.role: Detects when a coercive narrative captures institutional custody mechanisms.
activation_conditions: When legal or custodial systems are weaponized by a coercive narrative.
Detection of 'care' institutions being used for control.
symbols.failure_mode: False narrative captures institutional decision-makers.

symbols.name: ASPD Mapping: Healthcare/Clinical
symbols.role: Maps ASPD patterns within healthcare and clinical settings.
symbols.failure_mode: Gaslighting and dismissal compromise patient care.
